files.Title: Luny.Alarm
files.Summary: A lightweight readonly struct representing a fixed point in the future. Used for high-performance polling in update loops.

files.Title: Luny.Counter
files.Summary: A stateful manager for discrete integer counts (e.g., frames or heartbeats). Supports auto-repeat and progress tracking.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.ILunyAsset
files.Summary: Base interface for all engine-native assets.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.ILunyObject
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic interface for engine objects/nodes. Provides unified access to common object properties and operations. Safeguards all access to avoid exceptions when the engine-native object may have been destroyed.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.ILunyPath
files.Summary: Interface for engine-agnostic path representations.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.ILunyPathConverter
files.Summary: Converts between engine-native and engine-agnostic (Luny) paths.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.ILunyPrefab
files.Summary: Represents a loadable engine prefab.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.ILunyScene
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic scene interface.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyAssetId
files.Summary: Represents a unique internal ID for an engine asset. Stable for the duration of a session.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyAssetPath
files.Summary: Specialized path for engine assets.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyNativeObjectId
files.Summary: Engine-native unique identifier value for engine objects.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyObject
files.Summary: Proxy for engine-native objects/nodes/actors/...

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyObjectEvent
files.Summary: LunyObject lifecycle events.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyObjectId
files.Summary: Unique identifier for an engine object/node in a LunyScript context. Separate from engine's native GetInstanceID() for cross-engine compatibility. Sequential integers for deterministic ordering and debugging.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyPath
files.Summary: Represents a path that can be converted between engine-native and engine-agnostic (Luny) formats.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunySavePath
files.Summary: Specialized path for engine save data.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyScene
files.Summary: Proxy for engine-native scene instances.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunySceneEvent
files.Summary: LunyObject lifecycle events.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyTime
files.Summary: Shared utility helpers for transform blocks.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyTransform
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic proxy for native transform types (UnityEngine.Transform, Godot.Node3D, etc.).

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Bridge.LunyTransformSpace
files.Summary: Specifies the coordinate space in which to operate.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Diagnostics.ILunyEngineProfiler
files.Summary: Concrete implementation of engine-level profiling. Tracks execution time for each lifecycle observer with configurable rolling average. Public methods use [Conditional] attributes - completely stripped in release builds unless LUNY_PROFILE defined.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Diagnostics.ILunyEngineProfilerSnapshot
files.Summary: Immutable snapshot of profiler state at a specific point in time. Useful for querying performance metrics without blocking the profiler.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Diagnostics.LunyEngineLifecycleEvents
files.Summary: LunyScript lifecycle events.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Diagnostics.LunyObserverMetrics
files.Summary: Performance metrics for a single lifecycle observer. Tracks execution time statistics and error counts.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyApplicationService
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic application control.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyAssetService
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic Asset management service.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyDebugService
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic debug and logging service.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyEditorService
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic editor service.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyEngineService
files.Summary: Marker interface for engine-agnostic services: APIs such as Debug, Input, etc. Implementations are auto-discovered and registered at startup.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyInputService
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic input service providing event-driven and polling access to input actions.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyObjectService
files.Summary: Provides engine-agnostic methods for creating objects and primitives.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunySceneService
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic scene information service.

files.Title: Luny.Engine.Services.ILunyTimeService
files.Summary: Provides engine-agnostic access to time and frame information.

files.Title: Luny.Exceptions.LunyBridgeException
files.Summary: Exception thrown when a bridging exception occurs in the Luny framework, such as initializing a proxy object with a null reference.

files.Title: Luny.Exceptions.LunyException
files.Summary: Base class for all exceptions thrown by the Luny framework.

files.Title: Luny.Exceptions.LunyLifecycleException
files.Summary: Exception thrown when a lifecycle-related error occurs in the Luny framework, such as singleton duplication or unexpected adapter removal.

files.Title: Luny.Exceptions.LunyServiceException
files.Summary: Exception thrown when a service-related error occurs in the Luny framework, such as service not found or invalid service interface implementation.

files.Title: Luny.ILunyEngine
files.Summary: LunyEngine interface - receives callbacks from engine adapters and provides service access.

files.Title: Luny.ILunyEngineNativeAdapter
files.Summary: Interface for the native engine adapter.

files.Title: Luny.ILunyEngineObserver
files.Summary: Lifecycle observer interface - receives callbacks from LunyEngine.

files.Title: Luny.ITable
files.Summary: Dictionary-based variable storage..

files.Title: Luny.LogEntry
files.Summary: Represents a single log entry in the internal Luny logging system. Uses FrameCount and ElapsedSeconds instead of DateTime for precise game-time tracking.

files.Title: Luny.LogLevel
files.Summary: Log message severity levels.

files.Title: Luny.LunyEngine
files.Summary: Singleton engine that discovers and manages services and lifecycle observers.

files.Title: Luny.LunyLogger
files.Summary: Engine-agnostic logger entry point. Delegates to an installable engine-specific logger. Default fallback logs to console until an engine replaces it. Also provides internal logging system for Luny-specific logs (opt-in).

files.Title: Luny.Number
files.Summary: A primitive type that wraps a double and provides implicit conversions from and to various types.

files.Title: Luny.Stopwatch
files.Summary: A lightweight readonly struct that records a point in time to measure duration.

files.Title: Luny.Table
files.Summary: Dictionary-based variable storage.

files.Title: Luny.Timer
files.Summary: A stateful manager for a countdown or count-up. Supports pausing, time-scaling, and auto-repeat.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Bridge.UnityLogger
files.Summary: Unity-specific implementation of the Luny logger that forwards to UnityEngine.Debug.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Services.UnityApplicationService
files.Summary: Unity implementation of application control.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Services.UnityDebugService
files.Summary: Unity implementation of Debug.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Services.UnityEditorService
files.Summary: Unity implementation of Debug.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Services.UnityInputService
files.Summary: Unity implementation of input service. Subscribes to InputSystem action map callbacks and raises Luny input events.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Services.UnitySceneService
files.Summary: Unity implementation of scene information.

files.Title: Luny.Unity.Engine.Services.UnityTimeService
files.Summary: Unity implementation of time service. Uses Unity's Time.frameCount and Time.realtimeSinceStartupAsDouble for cross-platform consistency.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ComputedVariableBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for variable blocks that compute their value on-the-fly from runtime context rather than reading from a Table entry. TargetHandle is permanently null, so Set/Add/etc. will throw LunyScriptVariableException ("Cannot modify read-only variable").

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ConstantVariableBlock
files.Summary: Block that returns a constant variable value.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ICoroutineBlock
files.Summary: Represents a coroutine block that runs perpetually (indefinitely). Coroutines can be started, stopped, paused, resumed.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ICounterCoroutineBlock
files.Summary: Represents a coroutine counter block. Counters elapse after a specific number of frames/heartbeats have passed.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.IScriptBlock
files.Summary: Base interface for LunyScript blocks.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ITimerCoroutineBlock
files.Summary: Represents a coroutine timer block. Timers fire after a duration elapses.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.IfBlock
files.Summary: Builder for constructing 'If' blocks with 'ElseIf' and 'Else' branches.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ScriptActionBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for action blocks that perform an action that may alter game state.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ScriptBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for all LunyScript blocks.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.ScriptConditionBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for condition blocks that evaluate to a boolean result.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.SequenceBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for sequence blocks that contain child action blocks.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.TableVariableBlock
files.Summary: Block that holds a reference to a script variable.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.TransformInterpolateBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for blocks that interpolate or step a transform property toward a target over time. Holds the shared optional parameters: speed, deadZone, axisLock, responsiveness.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.TransformInterpolateTowardsObjectBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for Towards blocks whose target is an in the scene (Move and Rotate towards).

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.TransformInterpolateTowardsVariableBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for Towards blocks whose target is a value (Scale towards).

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.VarAccessor
files.Summary: Provides indexed access to script variables. Getter returns a VariableBlock for use in script expressions and conditions. Setter performs immediate variable assignment during Build().

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.VariableBlock<T>
files.Summary: Abstract base for blocks that evaluate to a typed struct value. Separate from the scalar hierarchy; does not participate in arithmetic, comparison, or boolean condition operators.

files.Title: LunyScript.Blocks.VariableBlock
files.Summary: Abstract base for variable blocks that evaluate to a runtime Variable. Extends ScriptConditionBlock because variables are implicitly usable as conditions (via AsBoolean conversion).

files.Title: LunyScript.CoroutineBuilder
files.Summary: Entry point for the Coroutine fluent builder chain. Usage: Coroutine("name").For(3).Seconds().OnFrameUpdate(blocks).WhenElapsed(blocks); Coroutine("name").OnFrameUpdate(blocks).WhenStopped(blocks).Do(blocks); Coroutine("name").OnHeartbeat(blocks).Do(blocks);

files.Title: LunyScript.CoroutineCounterBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Counter runs blocks either once or repeatedly after a given number of frames/heartbeats. Usage: Counter("name").In(5).Frames().Do(blocks); Counter("name").Every(10).Heartbeats().Do(blocks);

files.Title: LunyScript.CoroutineTimerBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Fluent builder for timer coroutines. Usage: Timer("name").In(3).Seconds().Do(blocks); Timer("name").Every(1.5).Minutes().Do(blocks);

files.Title: LunyScript.DebugApi
files.Summary: Provides diagnostics blocks which are omitted from release builds, unless the scripting symbol LUNYSCRIPT_DEBUG is defined.

files.Title: LunyScript.Diagnostics.ScriptBlockMetrics
files.Summary: Performance metrics for a single block (sequence or individual block). Tracks execution time statistics and error counts.

files.Title: LunyScript.Diagnostics.ScriptBlockProfiler
files.Summary: Concrete implementation of block-level profiling for LunyScript execution. Tracks execution time for each sequence/block with configurable rolling average. Public methods use [Conditional] attributes - completely stripped in release builds unless DEBUG or LUNYSCRIPT_DEBUG defined.

files.Title: LunyScript.Diagnostics.ScriptBlockProfilerSnapshot
files.Summary: Immutable snapshot of block profiler state at a specific point in time. Useful for querying performance metrics without blocking the profiler.

files.Title: LunyScript.Diagnostics.ScriptDebugHooks
files.Summary: Debugging hooks for execution tracing and breakpoints. Events and tracing are only invoked when DEBUG or LUNYSCRIPT_DEBUG is defined.

files.Title: LunyScript.Diagnostics.ScriptExecutionTrace
files.Summary: Captures execution information for a single block execution. Used by debug hooks to track execution flow with frame/time information.

files.Title: LunyScript.EditorApi
files.Summary: Provides Editor-only functionality. In builds these blocks are ignored (no-op).

files.Title: LunyScript.Exceptions.LunyScriptMaxIterationException
files.Summary: Exception thrown when a script loop exceeds the maximum allowed iterations.

files.Title: LunyScript.ForBlockBuilder
files.Summary: Builder for 'For' loops.

files.Title: LunyScript.IScriptDefinition
files.Summary: Metadata for a discovered LunyScript type. Represents the script ID and associated Type, not an instance.

files.Title: LunyScript.IScriptEngine
files.Summary: Public interface for LunyScript

files.Title: LunyScript.IScriptRuntimeContext
files.Summary: Runtime context for a LunyScript instance operating on a specific object. Contains the script metadata, object reference, variables, and registered sequences.

files.Title: LunyScript.InputAxisBuilder
files.Summary: Provides condition and value accessors for a named axis input action.

files.Title: LunyScript.InputBuilder
files.Summary: Provides access to input action values. Blocks poll the input service for last known state.

files.Title: LunyScript.InputButtonBuilder
files.Summary: Provides condition and value accessors for a named button input action.

files.Title: LunyScript.ObjectBuilder
files.Summary: Provides operations for objects.

files.Title: LunyScript.OnObjectEventBuilder
files.Summary: Handles object centered/targeted events, eg state, update, collision events.

files.Title: LunyScript.PhysicsEventBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Fluent builder for filtered collision/trigger event sequences. Filters (Tagged, Named, Layered, Masked, Typed) are order-independent and accumulate. Event handlers (Begins, Updates, Ends) are also order-independent. Parameters within a filter kind are OR-combined; different kinds are AND-combined.

files.Title: LunyScript.SceneApi
files.Summary: Provides operations for managing Scenes and accessing the scene hierarchy.

files.Title: LunyScript.Script
files.Summary: Abstract base class for all LunyScripts. Provides the API interface for beginner-friendly visual scripting in C#. Users inherit from this class and implement Build() to construct their script logic.

files.Title: LunyScript.ScriptBlockId
files.Summary: Unique identifier for a Sequence/FSM/BT instance. Sequential integers for deterministic ordering and debugging.

files.Title: LunyScript.ScriptEngine
files.Summary: Public interface for LunyScript

files.Title: LunyScript.ScriptId
files.Summary: Unique identifier for a LunyScript definition (type). Sequential integers for deterministic ordering and debugging.

files.Title: LunyScript.TransformLookAtBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Fluent builder for . Usage: Transform.LookAt(target).WorldUp(v).LockX()

files.Title: LunyScript.TransformPositionBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Fluent builder for Move-Towards blocks. Usage: Transform.MoveTowards(target).Speed(3).Responsiveness(2).LockY() Transform.MoveTowards(target).Speed(3).Lerp() Transform.MoveTowards(target).Speed(3).Slerp()

files.Title: LunyScript.TransformRotationBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Fluent builder for Rotate-Towards blocks. Usage: Transform.RotateTowards(target).Speed(45).Responsiveness(2).LockY() Transform.RotateTowards(target).Speed(45).Lerp() Transform.RotateTowards(target).Speed(45).Slerp()

files.Title: LunyScript.TransformScaleBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Fluent builder for Scale-Towards blocks. Usage: Transform.ScaleTowards(targetScale).Speed(1).Responsiveness(2).LockY() Transform.ScaleTowards(targetScale).Speed(1).Lerp() Transform.ScaleTowards(targetScale).Speed(1).Slerp()

files.Title: LunyScript.WhenGlobalEventBuilder
files.Summary: Handles external events: Scene, Input, Collision, Messages.

files.Title: LunyScript.WhenSceneEventBuilder
files.Summary: Scene Events

files.Title: LunyScript.WhileBlockBuilder
files.Summary: Builder for 'While' loops.
